THE MOTION IS UNTIMELY IN LIGHT OF THE NOVEMBER 18, 2013 TRIAL DATE IN CASE CGC-12-520686. THE OTHER CASE (CGC-13-532668) WAS JUST FILED ON JULY 8, 2013. WHILE THE CASES SHARE COMMON LEGAL ISSUES, THE OVERLAP IN FACTUAL ISSUES IS MORE ATTENUATED. THE TENANTS RESIDED AT THE HOTEL AT DIFFERENT TIMES. WHILE THERE MAY BE SOME OVERLAP IN WHAT DEFECTS WERE ENCOUNTERED, EACH TENANT DID NOT HAVE AN IDENTICAL EXPERIENCE. Mark Hooshmand, Esq. of Hooshmand Law Group, Tel. 415.318.5709, for plaintiff and opposing party.

RULING: The matter was argued. At the conclusion of argument, the Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS BALWANTSINH THAKOR, LATABEN THAKOR and SHREE JALARAM HOTEL LP'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-13-532668 WITH CASE CGC-12-520686 is denied. The motion is untimely in light of the November 18, 2013 trial date in case CGC-12-520686. The other case (CGC-13-532668) was just filed on July 8, 2013. While the cases share common legal issues, the overlap in factual issues is more attenuated. The tenants resided at the hotel at different times. While there may be some overlap in what defects were encountered, each tenant did not have an identical experience. Adding the additional plaintiffs in the later filed case to this case--where there are already 25 plaintiffs--will complicate the case and may lead to juror confusion. Order signed. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
